violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Raw beef above sausage in the cold hold on the cook line.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Tongs in the salad cold hold laying down in the lettuce.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Blade on the large can opener has debris on it.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Watched several employees change tasks and gloves without washing hands.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Box of raw pork underneath a box of raw beef in the walk in cooler. Employee corrected immediately.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Cold hold on the end of the prep line is at 45 F. Establishment is going to rearrange so they don't have an open cold hold directly in front of the hot oven.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Clean plates and bowls on the table in the back are not inverted. Cups on the top shelf of the rack in the cooking area are not inverted.
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Installed, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Prevented, separated, segregated (5 pts deducted)
Storage, properly handled (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
